creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
files/patch-bug1128161 was removed on update because upstream backported the fix to Firefox 37 (Aurora at the time). See status-* flags and hg.mozilla.org links in

https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1128161

There could be another regression, I haven't checked LOGGING build yet.
